prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is E-202 Rigid & PVC conduit within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.2 Raceway. The observed field condition is: no bushing on RMC where required. The work is being assessed at the staged lifecycle state with source anchors NEC Art. 344, 352.
title: T1 E-202 Tool & material selection
